title: Temporal coupling: App::set_api_config must be called before App::run
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Dimension: Cognitive Readability (Temporal Coupling) / Error Orchestration
Location: src/tui/app.rs:322-335 set_api_config and src/tui/app.rs:348-477 run. Also affected: set_memory_db, set_hook_engine, set_rules_content (inferred; called from main.rs::cmd_tui).
Violation: App::new() produces an App with endpoint="", headers=Vec::new(), claude_code_token=None. If run() is called without prior set_api_config, spawn_api_turn will send an empty endpoint to reqwest and fail obscurely (line 1355: self.endpoint.clone() -> empty). There is no contract enforcing the required initialization sequence. The compiler cannot help.
Mandated Refactor: Eliminate the two-phase init. Introduce AppBuilder { model, provider, endpoint, headers, system_prompt, ... } with builder methods that finalize into App via fn build(self) -> App. App::new without the required params must not exist. Alternative: take ApiConfig, Hooks, Rules, Memory as constructor parameters so missing wiring is a compile error. This pattern matches Claude Code's session construction.
